examples.text: دَرَجَاتُ الْقِسِّيسِيَّةِ عِنْدَ الْمَلْكَانِيَّةِ وَالْيَعَاقِبَةِ ثَلَاثَةٌ: أُسْقُفٌ، وَقِسٌّ، وَشَمَّاسٌ.
examples.english: The orders of the priesthood in the Eastern and Oriental Churches are three: bishop, priest, and deacon.
I watched a sermon by an American pastor.

etymology.text:
Clipping of قِسِّيس (qissīs), from Classical Syriac ܩܫܝܫܐ (qašīšā, “priest”).

See the etymology of the corresponding lemma form.
